prompt: Documentary photography style. A single pair of small worn children's shoes sitting at the very edge of a vast dark grey ocean. The shoes are faded, scuffed, and slightly too small. The shoreline is made of cold grey pebbles and damp sand. The ocean stretches endlessly to the horizon under a heavy overcast sky, with no people visible anywhere. The shoes sit alone in the lower foreground, slightly off-center, with vast empty space dominating the frame. Gentle waves approach but do not touch them. Mood: profound absence, quiet grief, and irreversible loss. Color palette: deep slate grey water, desaturated charcoal sky, muted blue on the shoes. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field. Absolutely no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no legends, no chart elements.
dataset_name: UNHCR Global Trends — Refugee and Displacement Statistics
insight: By 2023, 1 in 74 people worldwide had been forcibly displaced — the highest level ever recorded.
